Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/
Avvik: 95 | Bestått: 222
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mingatbrann.alesund.kommune.no/MinGatBrann/" itemprop="url" tabindex="0" target="_blank"><span class="avia-bullet"></span><span class="avia-menu-text">Logg inn i MinGat-Brann</span></
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://aabv.landax.no/authenticate/login/?gotoUrl=%2Fauthenticate%2Fauthorizeclient%3FgotoUrl%3D%252F%26response_type%3Dcode%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Faabv.landax.no%252Flogin%26c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Lenke til branntips.no'

<a class="alignnone" href="https://branntips.no" rel="noopener" role="" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; display: inline-block; position: relative; overflow: hidden;" target="_blank"><img alt="Lenke
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="alignnone" href="https://branntips.no" rel="noopener" role="" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; display: inline-block; position: relative; overflow: hidden;" target="_blank"><img alt="Lenke
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-visually-impaired" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-cognitive-disability" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-adhd-friendly" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-blind-users" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 2 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (75 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Alarm for Næringsliv – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/alarm-for-naeringsliv-2/
Avvik: 93 | Bestått: 201
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: left;"><strong>*Årsavgift – t</strong><strong>ype alarm:</strong></h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mingatbrann.alesund.kommune.no/MinGatBrann/" itemprop="url" tabindex="0" target="_blank"><span class="avia-bullet"></span><span class="avia-menu-text">Logg inn i MinGat-Brann</span></

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-visually-impaired" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-cognitive-disability" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-adhd-friendly" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-blind-users" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 2 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (72 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Invalid ARIA role: 'graphics-symbol'

Use a valid ARIA role from the specification

SERIOUS

Vær oppmerksom – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/2026/02/05/vaer-oppmerksom/
Avvik: 96 | Bestått: 225
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5 class="av-share-link-description av-no-toc">Del dette innlegget</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>

4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 2 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (73 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

110-sentralen – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/110-sentralen/
Avvik: 87 | Bestått: 192
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mingatbrann.alesund.kommune.no/MinGatBrann/" itemprop="url" tabindex="0" target="_blank"><span class="avia-bullet"></span><span class="avia-menu-text">Logg inn i MinGat-Brann</span></
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://aabv.landax.no/authenticate/login/?gotoUrl=%2Fauthenticate%2Fauthorizeclient%3FgotoUrl%3D%252F%26response_type%3Dcode%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Faabv.landax.no%252Flogin%26c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skjema.alesund.kommune.no/skjema/ALE013/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Søknadsskjema for øvelsesforespørsel</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skjema.alesund.kommune.no/skjema/ALE0111/Registrering_for_telefonisk_pning_av_bom" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Registrering for telefonisk åpning av bom</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-visually-impaired" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-cognitive-disability" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-adhd-friendly" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-blind-users" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 3 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (72 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'graphics-symbol'

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-2" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-2" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 25 32" width
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-3" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-3" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 19 32" width

Presse – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/presse/
Avvik: 90 | Bestått: 197
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mingatbrann.alesund.kommune.no/MinGatBrann/" itemprop="url" tabindex="0" target="_blank"><span class="avia-bullet"></span><span class="avia-menu-text">Logg inn i MinGat-Brann</span></
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-visually-impaired" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-cognitive-disability" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-adhd-friendly" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-blind-users" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 3 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (72 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'graphics-symbol'

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-2" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-2" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 25 32" width
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-3" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-3" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 19 32" width

Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/
Avvik: 96 | Bestått: 224
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mingatbrann.alesund.kommune.no/MinGatBrann/" itemprop="url" tabindex="0" target="_blank"><span class="avia-bullet"></span><span class="avia-menu-text">Logg inn i MinGat-Brann</span></
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<body>

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 2 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (75 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Use a valid ARIA role from the specification

Oppdatering kontaktliste for alarmkunder – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/kontaktliste/
Avvik: 95 | Bestått: 198
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 data-end="1084" data-start="1049">Hvem bør stå som kontaktperson?</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="av-special-heading-tag" itemprop="headline">(Vi får i denne løsningen automatisk informasjon ved endringer, som krever manuel endring)</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="av-special-heading-tag" itemprop="headline">(Vi får i denne løsningen automatisk informasjon ved endringer, som krever manuel endring)</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mingatbrann.alesund.kommune.no/MinGatBrann/" itemprop="url" tabindex="0" target="_blank"><span class="avia-bullet"></span><span class="avia-menu-text">Logg inn i MinGat-Brann</span></
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://aabv.landax.no/authenticate/login/?gotoUrl=%2Fauthenticate%2Fauthorizeclient%3FgotoUrl%3D%252F%26response_type%3Dcode%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Faabv.landax.no%252Flogin%26c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til skjema i vårt system'

<a aria-label="Gå til skjema i vårt system" class="avia-button av-1x35ym-af01fd97f250aaeb25f2304482e7cb3a av-link-btn avia-icon_select-no avia-size-medium avia-position-center avia-color-theme-color"
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-visually-impaired" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-cognitive-disability" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-adhd-friendly" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-blind-users" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 3 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (72 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'graphics-symbol'

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-2" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-2" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 25 32" width
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'graphics-symbol'

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-3" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-3" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 19 32" width
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

God jul og Godt Nyttår – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/2025/12/19/god-jul-og-godt-nyttar/
Avvik: 97 | Bestått: 227
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5 class="av-share-link-description av-no-toc">Del dette innlegget</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

id="main_content"

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>

Husk – Røykvarslerdagen 1. desember – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/2025/11/21/1-desember-roykvarslerdagen/
Avvik: 98 | Bestått: 233
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="av-share-link-description av-no-toc">Del dette innlegget</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be

Organisering – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/110-sentralen-2/
Avvik: 93 | Bestått: 192
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mingatbrann.alesund.kommune.no/MinGatBrann/" itemprop="url" tabindex="0" target="_blank"><span class="avia-bullet"></span><span class="avia-menu-text">Logg inn i MinGat-Brann</span></
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://aabv.landax.no/authenticate/login/?gotoUrl=%2Fauthenticate%2Fauthorizeclient%3FgotoUrl%3D%252F%26response_type%3Dcode%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Faabv.landax.no%252Flogin%26c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Lenke til møteportal (åpnes i ny fane)'

<a href="https://alesund.acossky.no/moteportal" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Lenke til møteportal (åpnes i ny fane)</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skjema.alesund.kommune.no/skjema/ALE013/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Søknadsskjema for øvelsesforespørsel</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skjema.alesund.kommune.no/skjema/ALE0111/Registrering_for_telefonisk_pning_av_bom" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Registrering for telefonisk åpning av bom</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-visually-impaired" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-cognitive-disability" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-adhd-friendly" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-blind-users" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<th class="">Verv</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="">Region</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 4 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (72 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'graphics-symbol'

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-2" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-2" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 25 32" width
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification

SERIOUS

Fyrverkeri – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/2025/12/26/1840/
Avvik: 99 | Bestått: 238
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Hvis uhellet allikevel skulle oppstå:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="av-share-link-description av-no-toc">Del dette innlegget</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-visually-impaired" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-cognitive-disability" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

SERIOUS

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-blind-users" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 2 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (74 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

SERIOUS

Alarm – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/alarm/
Avvik: 92 | Bestått: 200
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100001" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-visually-impaired" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-cognitive-disability" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-adhd-friendly" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-blind-users" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 3 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (72 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'graphics-symbol'

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-2" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-2" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 25 32" width
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Sikringsradio havbruk – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/sikringsradio-havbruk/
Avvik: 89 | Bestått: 193
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas

Link opens in new window without indication

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 3 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (72 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>

MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be

Kontakt – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/kontakt/
Avvik: 92 | Bestått: 210
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mingatbrann.alesund.kommune.no/MinGatBrann/" itemprop="url" tabindex="0" target="_blank"><span class="avia-bullet"></span><span class="avia-menu-text">Logg inn i MinGat-Brann</span></
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://aabv.landax.no/authenticate/login/?gotoUrl=%2Fauthenticate%2Fauthorizeclient%3FgotoUrl%3D%252F%26response_type%3Dcode%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Faabv.landax.no%252Flogin%26c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Maps were disabled by the visitor on this site. Click to open the map in a new window.'

<a class="av_gmaps_browser_disabled av_text_confirm_link av_text_confirm_link_visible" href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=NEDRE%20STRANDGATE%2050%206005%20ÅLESUND%20%20Norway" t
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="mailto:helge.lunde@alesund.kommune.no"><br/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skjema.alesund.kommune.no/skjema/ALE013/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Søknadsskjema for øvelsesforespørsel</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skjema.alesund.kommune.no/skjema/ALE0111/Registrering_for_telefonisk_pning_av_bom" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Registrering for telefonisk åpning av bom</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100001" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-visually-impaired" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-cognitive-disability" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-adhd-friendly" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-blind-users" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
4.1.1 Parsing (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 4 times

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'av_gmap_0' appears 2 times

id="av_gmap_0"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'false' appears 3 times

id="false"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (72 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'graphics-symbol'

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-2" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-2" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 25 32" width
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-3" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-3" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 19 32" width

Arbeid på og i nærheten av alarmanlegg – Møre og Romsdal 110-sentral Ålesund KF

https://110-sentralen.no/2025/10/01/arbeid-pa-og-i-naerheten-av-alarmanlegg/
Avvik: 99 | Bestått: 232
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><strong>Utløst alarm:</strong></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="av-share-link-description av-no-toc">Del dette innlegget</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (1 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 1 pages]
Avvik: 13 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative (×1 across article pages)

<canvas id="mdp-readabler-voice-visualization"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading (×1 across article pages)

<body class="blog wp-theme-enfold wp-child-theme-enfold-child stretched rtl_columns av-curtain-numeric open_sans_condensed open_sans avia-responsive-images-support av-recaptcha-enabled av-google-badge
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1 (×1 across article pages)

<h3 class="slide-entry-title entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://110-sentralen.no/2026/02/05/vaer-oppmerksom/" title="Vær oppmerksom">Vær oppmerksom</a></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1) (×1 across article pages)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×3 across article pages)

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×4 across article pages)

<a href="https://mingatbrann.alesund.kommune.no/MinGatBrann/" itemprop="url" tabindex="0" target="_blank"><span class="avia-bullet"></span><span class="avia-menu-text">Logg inn i MinGat-Brann</span></
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label (×1 across article pages)

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible (×5 across article pages)

<input name="mdp-readabler-accessibility-profile-epilepsy" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="on"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main_content' appears 2 times (×1 across article pages)

id="main_content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (4 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute (×1 across article pages)

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name (×1 across article pages)

<nav class="main_menu" data-selectname="Velg en side" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/SiteNavigationElement" role="navigation"><div class="avia-menu av-main-nav-wrap av_menu_icon_be
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'graphics-symbol' (×2 across article pages)

<svg aria-describedby="av-svg-desc-2" aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="av-svg-title-2" height="32" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" role="graphics-symbol" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 25 32" width
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container (×68 across article pages)

<button aria-label="Close Accessibility Panel" id="mdp-readabler-popup-close"></button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://www.110-sentralen.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.110-sentralen.no --max-pages 16 --format html
